title: Eva 02s new design in Rebuild
wikitext:
[]: Eva-02's new design in Rebuild             Quote Post by Ornette » Tue Nov 04, 2008 3:28 pm http://evageeks.org/2008/11/new-evangelion-unit-02-designs/ Thanks AchtungAffen for the info Discuss.

[]:             Quote Post by majlund » Tue Nov 04, 2008 3:53 pm Whoah! I'm... I'm speechless.

[]:             Quote Post by BobBQ » Tue Nov 04, 2008 4:01 pm Once again, too much gattai.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Tue Nov 04, 2008 4:06 pm Craziness. Not sure if I want. It's interesting though.

[]:             Quote Post by V » Tue Nov 04, 2008 4:08 pm hell's bells, actual news! looks like the four month long dry spell we've been in may be over well....if it DID have to have horns, I'm happy they didn't just stick antennae on it (which is what the trailer made it look like) but just sort of "extended the nose armor" as for the proportions, yes: the chest is noticeably thinner, not simply in proportion, but to the naked eye the armor plates look clipped: they stop and don't come to a point; is it just an optical illusion caused by the different paint job on the abdomen, or is the abdomen noticeably longer now? (as it seemed for "Eva-06"?) Eva-00 and Eva-01 were really just slight repaints. This does seem somewhat of a departure. Newtype December, eh? well maybe the eyespacing is different just because of this one angle we're seeing it from; still, while the head does seem more "elongated", it's a lot better than the End of Eva design tweaks what does "gattai" mean? Sailor Star Dust wrote: Craziness. Not sure if I want. It's interesting though.

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Tue Nov 04, 2008 4:15 pm not a fan of the thin head... horns more to the side would have helped this.

[]:             Quote Post by Lucretius » Tue Nov 04, 2008 4:52 pm V wrote: Madness?! *This* *IS....

[]:             Quote Post by Action_Bastard » Tue Nov 04, 2008 5:41 pm I like everything about it, except for the horns. I have provided a screenshot, and in the shot the horns looks smaller and more insect-like.

[]:             Quote Post by Formless One » Tue Nov 04, 2008 5:47 pm Its the lighting and the effect of the eyes. The two pictures are actually consistent with each other. The only difference is the color of the horns: in the screen in the OP, they are colored yellow, in that screenshot they are colored red.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue Nov 04, 2008 8:17 pm Aside from the horns and alterations to the paint scheme (the waist band, etc.), Eva-02 in Rebuild is nothing we didn't already see in EoE. I'm preparing some images to show what I mean, but it's taking longer than I thought, so meantime I'll leave you with these to contemplate. (While not screenshots, both represent appearances that she takes on in the actual film. Depending on who's animating a given cut.) http://www.evacommentary.org/images_production/eva02_design_eoe.gif http://www.evacommentary.org/images_illos/honda_ubf.jpg The bit about TTGL in the news blurb needs to go -- it's rather misleading.

[]:             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Tue Nov 04, 2008 9:10 pm Reichu wrote: Aside from the horns and alterations to the paint scheme (the waist band, etc.), Eva-02 in Rebuild is nothing we didn't already see in EoE.

[]:             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Tue Nov 04, 2008 9:18 pm So is this TV commerical on Youtube? As for the Horns, they're interesting. I have to see them in motion before I critique them and I'd be a huge hypocrite to after saying I wish for drastic change in Rebuild to say "Do Not Want". So is this NewType issue going to talk about the two new Evas as well? And based on the coloring- is Unit 02 more maroon and less bright red?

[]:             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Tue Nov 04, 2008 9:23 pm No, it's on nicovideo. http://www.nicovideo.jp/watch/nm5122045 You need to register, so here's a site with some registration help. http://thenextweb.org/2008/01/15/how-to-register-for-japanese-video-site-nico-nico-douga/

[]:             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Tue Nov 04, 2008 9:52 pm Could someone upload said video to say Youtube or something?

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue Nov 04, 2008 11:20 pm Gendo's Papa wrote: And based on the coloring- is Unit 02 more maroon and less bright red?

[]:             Quote Post by Bluespade » Wed Nov 05, 2008 1:50 am Oh hell no. Do not want. And I actually LIKED the Unit 01 redesign...

[]:             Quote Post by qu4d » Wed Nov 05, 2008 2:27 am looks awesome... me wants more

[]:             Quote Post by Dartz » Wed Nov 05, 2008 3:27 am What's that hand grabbing it by thew waist? It looks like an Eva's hand... but much bigger. Or just a thumb.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Nov 05, 2008 4:58 am Well, folks, here's what we all knew NEEDED to be done. I might do more with it later. Depends. And yes, Dartz. That is a thumb.

[]:             Quote Post by Dartz » Wed Nov 05, 2008 5:55 am It's a bloody big one. Make's me wonder what could be big enough to try Grab Unit 02 around the waist like a child grabbing an Action Man. I thought it might've been Sandalphon or something, because the background looks a bit like a volcano, but the hand looks armoured...
summary:
[]: Eva-02's new design in Rebuild             Quote Post by Ornette » Tue Nov 04, 2008 3:28 pm http://evageeks.org/2008/11/new-evangelion-unit-02-designs/ Thanks AchtungAffen for the info Discuss.

[]:             Quote Post by majlund » Tue Nov 04, 2008 3:53 pm Whoah! I'm... I'm speechless.

[]:             Quote Post by BobBQ
